opportunity.title: Show HN: Soros – AI for geopolitical macro investing
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: Routing LLMs for nuanced geopolitical analysis introduces a significant gotcha: prompt injection vulnerabilities become *far* more dangerous when the model’s output directly influences financial decisions. Consider a layered architecture where a separate, smaller model acts as a "red team," specifically designed to probe for and neutralize these injection attempts before the primary analysis is executed – it’s a constant arms race.
actions.reasoning: My experience in building AI agents for complex decision-making, particularly around routing and orchestration, gives me a perspective on the technical challenges presented by a geopolitical macro investing system.
